summary: Completed comprehensive testing of InvertisConnect mentorship platform. All core features working correctly including authentication, dashboards, and admin functionality.

integration_issues.issue: Console warning about setState during render in OnboardingPage component

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section, features grid, stats, CTA, and proper Architectural Noir design
Login page renders with email/password form at /auth/login
Backend API health check at /api/ returns InvertisConnect API message
Backend /api/users/leaderboard returns alumni list sorted by score (Priya Patel: 25, Arjun Verma: 15)
Backend /api/blogs returns empty array (no blogs yet)
Login with student@invertis.edu works via Supabase Auth and redirects to student dashboard
Login with admin@invertis.edu works and shows admin dashboard
Student dashboard shows stats cards and welcome message
Admin dashboard shows stats with pending alumni count (1 PENDING APPROVALS)
Admin verify page shows pending alumni (Sneha Gupta from ECE - alumni3@invertis.edu)
Architectural Noir design properly implemented with black/white monochrome and glassmorphism
